title: Mystical Agriculture Tiered Crystals
description: Adds Tiered Crystals to Mystical Agriculture.
body:
### This mod adds 5 new crafting crystals to Mystical Agriculture, instead of just two. The crystals are:
#### 1.12- Inferium, Prudentium, Intermedium, Superium, and Supremium.
#### 1.16+- Inferium, Prudentium, Tertium, Imperium, and Supremium. 

The recipes for the crystals are nested, so you can't just jump to a higher crystal without crafting the previous tier.
 

- Download Mystical Agriculture [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mystical-agriculture).
- Download Mystical Agradditions [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mystical-agradditions).
 


- If you have Mystical Agradditions installed, the recipe for the Master Infusion Crystal will use **Insanium** instead of **Supremium**. Also, the Master Infusion Crystal will require a Supremium Infusion Crystal, regardless of whether or not you have Mystical Agradditions installed.
 

Config Options:

- You can set the durability of each crystal.

- You can change whether or not the crystals should have durability.
